summary: Rotten Tomatoes critic score for Melania documentary: 6-11% range across different time points after Jan 30 release
content:
Movie released Jan 30, 2026 in theaters. Brett Ratner directed, Amazon MGM Studios.

Critic scores reported:
- 6% (AOL, early)
- 7% (Daily Beast, 15 reviews, Friday evening Jan 31)
- 8% (ScreenRant, unknown time)
- 11% (MovieWeb, by Saturday Feb 1)

Audience score: 99%
CinemaScore: A

The score appears to have risen from 6-7% to 11% as more reviews came in over the first 2 days. This is extremely polarized - biggest critic/audience gap on record per MovieWeb.
